market_context: X/Twitter sentiment is cautiously bearish with traders noting the 5-day declines across SPY, QQQ and crypto amid elevated VIX. Pre-market futures point to a flat-to-down open and no major catalysts expected today beyond routine earnings. Options flow shows light put buying on tech names.

predictions.reasoning: SPY closed at 733.73 after a 0.6% 5-day drop and VIX at 17.91 signals lingering caution. X chatter highlights profit-taking and no strong bullish catalysts for today. Expect a modest decline to around 731.50 by close.
NVDA has shown relative resilience versus the broader market pullback. Light call flow observed in recent sessions and positive AI-related mentions on X support a rebound toward 223.40.
TSLA remains extended after recent gains and crypto weakness (BTC -2%) often correlates with selling in the name. X volume shows increased bearish commentary today.
Bitcoin already down 2% over five days with ETH underperforming further. X sentiment reflects risk-off flows and no immediate positive catalysts visible in pre-market.
